title: Crafting Tweaks
description: Adds over 700 new, vanilla-friendly quality of life crafting recipes!
body:
Really puts the "craft" in mineCRAFT with over 700 crafting, stonecutting, and smelting recipes:

-Wood can now be used in a stonecutter

-Craftable calcite, tuff and blackstone

-Recycle smooth, chiseled and cut stones back into their original form by smelting them

-Recycle old tools, items and armor back into their respective materials by smelting them (excl. wood because it can be used as fuel)

-Smelt extra armor trims into diamonds

-Unpack wool into string, packed and blue ice into ice, quartz blocks into quartz, magma blocks into magma cream

-Craftable copper golem statues

-Craftable name tags and enchanted golden apples

-Arrows can be smelted into iron flint, and spectral arrows into glowstone

-Black dye can be crafted from coal and charcoal

-Combine stairs, slabs, walls and carpet back into their block form

-Craft bone blocks straight from bones

-Crying obsidian can be crafted using obsidian and lapis

-Smelt crying obsidian back into obsidian

-Craft gravel from flint

-Smelt gravel into cobblestone

-Craft froglights using slimeballs, magma cream and shroomlights

-Craft shroomlights with glowstone and nether wart

-Craft powered rails with copper, aswell as gold

-Smelt rotten flesh into leather

-Smelt magma cream into slimeballs

-Craft magma cream using slimeballs and blaze powder

-Mossy stones can now be crafted using pale moss aswell

-Craft soul soil with soul sand and dirt

-Smelt soul sand into tinted glass

-Recolor any colored block

-Craft easy mud

Please note that this is a very large data pack and i may have forgotten to list some features. This data pack is a combination of all of my other crafting data packs, so if you don't like some of the listed features feel free to check out my other packs and customize your experience. Please comment any issues you may be having, aswell as inconsistencies and suggestions. I plan to keep this data pack updated for as long as i get ideas for it so keep an eye out for new versions!
